title: crepidiastrum denticulatum subsp. longiflorum
intro: Crepidiastrum denticulatum subsp. longiflorum, also known as the long-flowered crepidiastrum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The long-flowered crepidiastrum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
